products.name: Taylor Swift is stepping up the legal war on AI copycats

products.name: Now YouTube TV lets you multiview any channel you want

products.name: The FCC is going after the broadcast licenses of Disney-owned ABC stations

products.name: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
products.summary: Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity

products.name: Elon Musk takes the stand in high-profile trial against OpenAI

products.name: Amazon is already offering new OpenAI products on AWS
products.summary: A day after OpenAI got Microsoft to agree to end exclusive rights, AWS announced a slate of OpenAI model offerings, including a new agent service.

products.name: Amazon launches an AI-powered audio Q&A experience on product pages
products.summary: Amazon's new "Join the chat" feature lets you ask questions about products and receive AI-powered audio responses.
